title: Recipe tags search themes
summary: 36a/36b 계약을 기반으로 exact tag filter, title+approved tag search, GET /tags, HOME system-tag theme generation을 구현한다.
goal: 사용자가 HOME에서 승인된 태그로 레시피를 검색하고, HOME 테마가 품질 관리된 시스템 의미/source 태그에서만 만들어지도록 백엔드 조회 계약을 닫는다.

owners.claude: stage1 normally; 36c workpack gap was reconstructed from merged 36a contract in this branch

required_checks: pnpm vitest run tests/recipe-tags-search.test.ts tests/recipe-tags-route.test.ts tests/recipe-themes.test.ts tests/supabase-server.test.ts
verify_commands: pnpm vitest run tests/recipe-tags-search.test.ts tests/recipe-tags-route.test.ts tests/recipe-themes.test.ts tests/supabase-server.test.ts

notes: Stage 2 backend implementation completed on feature/be-36c-recipe-tags-search-themes. Implements exact tag filter, title plus public/approved tag label search, GET /tags public autocomplete, HOME dynamic themes from approved system semantic/source tags, 36c read RPCs, manual seed slugs, and no automatic romanization. Local verification passed: targeted 36c Vitest set, product contract regressions, pnpm verify:backend, validate:source-of-truth-sync, validate:workflow-v2, validate:workpack, git diff --check, local Supabase db reset, and local psql smoke for RPC signatures/seed/search/theme behavior.
